   "reasoning": "As an MLA facing re-election, I need to prioritize visible and popular programs that will win votes, and a funding boost is just that - a loud and clear message to my constituents that I'm committed to education. Teacher incentives and student scholarships are also key, as they directly benefit the vocal teachers and anxious parents who make up a significant portion of my voter base. I'm less keen on transparency reports, which could backfire if the numbers look bad, and staffing hiring, which, while popular with unions, is a longer-term play that may not yield immediate electoral benefits.",
   "confidence": 0.85
}
